testcase.name: testCheckoutProtectedAfterLogout

failure.message: Sau logout, /checkout phải redirect về /login hoặc trang chủ. URL: http://localhost:5173/checkout expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Sau logout, /checkout phải redirect về /login hoặc trang chủ. URL: http://localhost:5173/checkout expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at testcase.name: testLogoutSuccess

error.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of element located by By.xpath: //button[normalize-space()='Sign Out'] (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.22.0', revision: 'c5f3146703*' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.11' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 149.0.7827.54, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 149.0.7827.55 (3188f8a607ae..., userDataDir: C:\Users\ACER\AppData\Local...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:62676}, goog:processID: 18700, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:62676/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 149.0.7827.54, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 965ca3c51c6539fbd58aeda7ba4e6280
